❌ Unknown command: --help

Mother CLI
©2025 Agentluke
https://lukejamesmorrison.github.io/mother-docs/Framework/

Mother CLI is a tool design to help Space Engineers script
developers quick build custom scripts using modules and 
utilities provided by Mother Core. 

Usage:
    mother [command] [arguments] [options]

Available commands:
     install                                               Install Mother Core modules
     make:command [CommandName] --module? [ModuleName]     Create a new terminal command
     make:event [EventName] --module? [ModuleName]         Create a new event
     make:module [ModuleName]                              Create a new extension module
     new [ProjectName]                                     Create a new project
     update                                                Update Mother Core modules
